title: Slime beetle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''slime beetle''' was presumably a rather nasty [[Insect/Legends|insect]]. It was used as an insult.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{C|Mentioned as slang}}
